objective: Complete every safe, lawful, reversible and no-new-cost task available through authorised repositories, native connectors, GitHub Actions and approved staging runtimes; isolate genuine owner-only or provider-only blockers.
completion_chain: Source -> Request -> Requirement -> Module -> Artifact -> Test/Waiver -> Evidence -> Runtime -> Rollback -> Acceptance

autonomous: repository branches, code, tests, documentation and registries
safe pull requests and merges after passing checks
reuse of existing approved secret references
owner_or_provider_gate: login, MFA, CAPTCHA or hardware-key touch
creation or rotation of a missing protected value where no authorised vault connector exists

phases.name: Spec and denominator lock
phases.exit: All known tasks have source, owner, state, blocker, test and rollback fields.

phases.name: Credential and connector readiness
phases.exit: Safe values reused; missing protected values shown once; automatic resume enabled.

phases.name: Runtime auto-resume and harmless canaries
phases.exit: Ready groups run bounded read-only checks and write redacted evidence.

phases.name: Infrastructure and operations control plane
phases.exit: Topology, IAM, observability, backup, restore, incident, DR and cost contracts are implemented and tested.

phases.name: Knowledge Fabric and source ingestion
phases.exit: Accessible source denominator is processed with provenance, dedupe, retrieval and QA evidence.

phases.name: Command Centre and guided repair
phases.exit: Runtime adapters, readiness, alerts, blockers and safe repair guidance are federated.

phases.name: Cross-repository application completion
phases.exit: Hub, VTI, Property and Health source/runtime gaps are implemented or reduced to exact external blockers.

phases.name: Specialist domain factories
phases.exit: CFO, paper trading, agency and SaaS bounded products pass unit, security, cost and rollback tests.

phases.name: End-to-end staging federation
phases.exit: Contracts, privacy, negative, persistence, retry, recovery and cost tests pass.

phases.name: Controlled production promotion
phases.exit: Approved services are promoted with deployment IDs, health, rollback and monitoring evidence.

phases.name: Final reconciliation and acceptance
phases.exit: Every task is DONE_VERIFIED, WAIVED or BLOCKED with exact evidence; release and rollback manifests are signed off.

execution_rules: Always start from the highest-priority unblocked task.
Execute all independent safe tasks in parallel only when their writes do not conflict.
Use native free connectors only when they materially reduce manual work and require no hidden billing or scope expansion.
Never mark a provider or deployment task complete from repository evidence alone.
After each merge refresh task states, evidence pointers, blockers and the next executable queue.
Do not repeatedly ask for already-resolved values or optional integrations.
Show one consolidated HUMAN ACTION REQUIRED card only for current critical-path blockers.
rollback: Each tranche uses a dedicated branch and pull request. Revert the merge commit for repository rollback; provider state is unchanged unless separately evidenced and approved.
